pr_body: Renders a heading that echoes the search query.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,7 @@ from django.http import HttpResponse + + +def search_results(request): + query = request.GET.get("q", "") + heading = f"

Results for {query}

" + return HttpResponse(heading)

triage: {"file_tiers": {"search/views.py": "deep"}, "overall_risk": "medium", "relevant_dimensions": ["security"], "reasoning": "Deep-review the new view interpolating request text into an HTML response."}
analyze: {"findings": [{"finding_type": "xss", "evidence_tier": "judged", "query_match_id": null, "trace_path": null, "title": "Unescaped search query echoed into HTML", "description": "search_results() interpolates request.GET['q'] into an HTML string with an f-string and returns it as the response body without escaping; a query like
synthesize: Security finding: one HIGH xss -- request-derived search text formatted into an HTML response body without escaping.
